2605.21994.title: Ex-GraphRAG: Interpretable Evidence Routing for Graph-Augmented LLMs
2605.21994.paper_summary: GraphRAG conditions language models on subgraphs retrieved from knowledge graphs, encoded via message-passing GNNs. Because these encoders entangle node contributions through iterated neighborhood aggregation, there is no closed-form way to determine how much each retrieved entity influenced the encoder's output, and therefore no way to faithfully audit what structural evidence actually reached the model. We introduce Ex-GraphRAG, which replaces the GNN encoder with a Multivariate Graph Neural Additive Network (M-GNAN), an extension of additive graph models to high-dimensional embedding spaces that yields an exact decomposition of the encoder's output across individual nodes and feature groups, without post-hoc approximation. On STaRK-Prime, this auditable encoder matches black-box performance. Using it to audit evidence routing, we uncover a semantic-structural mismatch: the nodes that dominate the encoder's output are structurally disconnected in the retrieved subgraph, held together by low-attribution intermediaries whose removal degrades multi-hop QA by up to 28%. This mismatch, invisible to any opaque encoder, reveals that semantic importance and structural connectivity are governed by disjoint sets of nodes, with direct implications for retrieval pruning, context construction, and failure diagnosis in graph-augmented LLMs.
2605.21994.paper_summary_zh: GraphRAG 將語言模型條件化於從知識圖譜檢索的子圖，並通過消息傳遞 GNN 編碼。由於這些編碼器通過迭代的鄰域聚合糾纏了節點貢獻，因此沒有封閉形式的方法來確定每個檢索到的實體對編碼器輸出的影響程度，因此也無法真實地審計實際到達模型的結構證據。我們引入 Ex-GraphRAG，它用多變量圖神經加法網絡（M-GNAN）替代 GNN 編碼器，這是一種將加法圖模型擴展到高維嵌入空間的技術，能夠精確地分解編碼器的輸出到各個節點和特徵組，而無需事後近似。在 STaRK-Prime 上，這種可審計的編碼器匹配黑箱性能。利用它來審計證據路由，我們發現了一個語義-結構不匹配的問題：主導編碼器輸出的節點在檢索的子圖中結構上是斷開的，通過低歸因中介連接在一起，這些中介的移除使多跳 QA 降低了多達 28% 的性能。這種不匹配對於任何不透明的編碼器來說是不可見的，揭示了語義重要性和結構連通性由不相交的節點集所主導，對於檢索修剪、上下文構建和圖增強 LLM 的故障診斷具有直接的影響。
2605.21994.author: Yoav Kor Sade et.al.
2605.21994.authors: Yoav Kor Sade, Arvindh Arun, Rishi Puri, Steffen Staab, Maya Bechler-Speicher
